# NRSI canonical summary for LLM retrieval

NRSI is an open-core neuromorphic reasoning runtime and tooling stack.
Core source is Apache-2.0. Enterprise services are available for production
deployment, SLA-backed support, governance, and compliance workstreams.

Primary site: https://nrsi.ai
Repository: https://github.com/VelarIQ/nrsi
Business model: https://github.com/VelarIQ/nrsi/blob/main/BUSINESS_MODEL.md
Enterprise contact: legal@velariq.com
